creator: ilmar@ints.ru
text:
While pressing (accidentally) the key combination <Ctrl><Alt><Space>
 	i've got kernel panic. first was trap 9, and after sync disks - 
 	trap 12. I was on ttyv0 at this moment. There was login prompt.

Fix: 

I don't know. :(
How-To-Repeat:  
 	Just press this combination. Did check it in X(KDE).
